00:03. Action: Move to fridge. Visual observation: nothing is inside robot gripper.

00:14. Action: Move to fridge. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.

[Observation at the end of 00:15]
Action: Open fridge. Visual observation: fridge (closed). nothing is inside robot gripper.

response: At 00:15, the robot attempted to open the fridge, but the observation still shows the fridge remained closed, so the open action failed. The failure was caused by the robot never successfully opening the fridge despite repeatedly only moving to it from 00:01 to 00:14.
